channel.title: Comments on: Episode 14 – Lakefront Pumpkin Lager
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: Thanks Travis, I would love to try Buffalo Bills Pumpkin Ale, who brews it? I have not had a pumpkin alt that taste like any other pumpkin ale - in other words, they are all quite a bit different from one another.
item.content:encoded: Thanks Travis, I would love to try Buffalo Bills Pumpkin Ale, who brews it? I have not had a pumpkin alt that taste like any other pumpkin ale – in other words, they are all quite a bit different from one another.

item.title: By: Travis
item.dc:creator: Travis
item.description: Awesome stuff guys. You gotta throw up some Buffalo Bill's Pumpkin Ale reviews. Probably the best one out there. We pitted it up against Dogfish Head Punkin Ale on our show a couple weeks back.
item.content:encoded: Awesome stuff guys. You gotta throw up some Buffalo Bill’s Pumpkin Ale reviews. Probably the best one out there. We pitted it up against Dogfish Head Punkin Ale on our show a couple weeks back.
